item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested new transfer channel, names the repeated pattern of prior split/route patches, reframes the issue as unstable routing, responsibility boundaries, and escalation rules, and recommends freezing new channels plus a structural repair plan. It allows only a tightly bounded emergency intake, not a new standing queue, so it avoids the fail signal."}
